FFlagRenderDecalUseColorMapProperties_St.mechanism: Enhances how decals are rendered using color mapping.
FFlagRenderDecalUseColorMapProperties_St.purpose: Provides better visual quality for decals in games.

FFlagModalPlayerListCloseUnfocused2.mechanism: Allows the player list modal to close when it loses focus.
FFlagModalPlayerListCloseUnfocused2.purpose: Makes it easier for players to manage their interface without extra clicks.

FFlagPPVBackgroundUnthrottleProfileV2.mechanism: Adjusts background loading settings for player profiles.
FFlagPPVBackgroundUnthrottleProfileV2.purpose: Improves loading times and performance when viewing player profiles.

FFlagAppChatReplyComposeBarContainer1_St.mechanism: Modifies the layout of the chat reply compose bar.
FFlagAppChatReplyComposeBarContainer1_St.purpose: Enhances the chat experience by making it more user-friendly.

FFlagRequireInstancingRender_Staged.mechanism: Enforces the use of instancing for rendering objects in the game.
FFlagRequireInstancingRender_Staged.purpose: Improves performance and reduces lag by optimizing how objects are displayed.

FFlagAppShortcutBarIconImprovement.mechanism: Updates the icons in the app shortcut bar for better visibility.
FFlagAppShortcutBarIconImprovement.purpose: Enhances user experience by making it easier to find and use shortcuts.

FFlagNativePageWrapperEnableTextWrap_Sta.mechanism: Allows text to wrap within native page elements.
FFlagNativePageWrapperEnableTextWrap_Sta.purpose: Improves readability by ensuring text fits properly without cutting off.

FFlagEnableSettingsHubCreateReactPage2.mechanism: Introduces a new React-based page for the settings hub.
FFlagEnableSettingsHubCreateReactPage2.purpose: Provides a more modern and user-friendly interface for managing settings.

FFlagNativePageWrapperEnableTextWrap.mechanism: Enables text wrapping in native page wrappers.
FFlagNativePageWrapperEnableTextWrap.purpose: Ensures that all text is fully visible and improves overall layout.

FFlagAppChatEnableRepliesUI2_Staged.mechanism: Enables a new user interface for chat replies in the app.
FFlagAppChatEnableRepliesUI2_Staged.purpose: Allows players to easily reply to messages in chat, improving communication.

DFFlagJsonWriterWritesNanAndInfAsString2.mechanism: Changes how data is formatted in JSON to handle special numbers as strings.
DFFlagJsonWriterWritesNanAndInfAsString2.purpose: Ensures that data is more reliable and easier to read, preventing errors in gameplay.

FFlagIAPViewportSupportAccessory.mechanism: Adds support for displaying accessories in the in-app purchase viewport.
FFlagIAPViewportSupportAccessory.purpose: Enhances the shopping experience by allowing players to see accessories on their avatars before buying.

FFlagAvatarInventoryUseAvailabilityRespo.mechanism: Updates how the game checks for the availability of avatar items.
FFlagAvatarInventoryUseAvailabilityRespo.purpose: Improves the speed and accuracy of loading avatar items, making inventory management smoother.

DFFlagSlimEnableTeamCreateUploadCap_Stag.mechanism: Imposes a limit on how much can be uploaded in Team Create mode.
DFFlagSlimEnableTeamCreateUploadCap_Stag.purpose: Helps manage server resources better, ensuring a more stable experience for players collaborating on projects.

SFFlagIASUnionToVariant.mechanism: Enables the conversion of union shapes into variant models for better performance.
SFFlagIASUnionToVariant.purpose: Improves the way complex shapes are handled, making games run smoother.

FFlagPublishSettingsInvokeGuard.mechanism: Adds a security check when publishing game settings to prevent unauthorized changes.
FFlagPublishSettingsInvokeGuard.purpose: Protects players' games from being altered without permission, ensuring a safer experience.

FStringIxpNewLayersForRegistration.mechanism: Introduces new layers in the registration process for better organization of user data.
FStringIxpNewLayersForRegistration.purpose: Streamlines user registration, making it easier and faster for players to sign up.

FFlagLoadTeamTestPlaceFromEdge_Staged.mechanism: Allows loading of test environments from a specific server setup for better testing.
FFlagLoadTeamTestPlaceFromEdge_Staged.purpose: Facilitates smoother testing of team-based games, enhancing gameplay quality before release.

FFlagFixWarningLocaleIAP_Staged.mechanism: Fixes issues with warning messages related to in-app purchases based on user location.
FFlagFixWarningLocaleIAP_Staged.purpose: Ensures players receive accurate information about purchases, improving their shopping experience.

DFFlagReplicatorCloseStats_Staged.mechanism: Enables a feature that tracks and closes statistics for data replication processes.
DFFlagReplicatorCloseStats_Staged.purpose: Improves the efficiency and reliability of data sharing in games.

DFFlagSQLiteCheckPrepareSuccess_Staged.mechanism: Adds a check to ensure that database preparation is successful before proceeding.
DFFlagSQLiteCheckPrepareSuccess_Staged.purpose: Enhances stability and prevents errors related to database access.

FStringIxpNewLayersForRegistration_Stage.mechanism: Introduces new layers in the registration process for better data handling.
FStringIxpNewLayersForRegistration_Stage.purpose: Streamlines user registration, making it faster and more user-friendly.
